ddls:
CREATE TABLE "digital_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each digital asset */,
  "objectid" TEXT /* Unique string ID used in the website */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Name of the corresponding file for the asset */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the digital asset */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Entity responsible for creating the asset */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the asset was created */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the digital asset (e.g., image, document, video) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the asset */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated tags for easier categorization and search */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* Path to a thumbnail image for quick preview */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the asset file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* A checksum to ensure file integrity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the asset (e.g., active, archived, pending review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata_fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata field */,
  "display_name" TEXT /* Name displayed to the user */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the metadata field */,
  "dc_map" TEXT /* Mapping to Dublin Core metadata element */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or guidelines for the field */,
  "example" TEXT /* Example value for the field */,
  "required" TEXT /* Indication of whether the field is required */,
  "used_by" TEXT /* Parts of the system that use this field */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* The data type of the metadata field */,
  "max_length" INTEGER /* Maximum length for text fields */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the field */,
  "searchable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the field is searchable */,
  "sortable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the field is sortable */,
  "editable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the field is editable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital asset */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metadata field */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata field */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version to which this metadata applies */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., system, custom) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_metadata_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES metadata_fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_metadata_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of an asset */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital asset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the asset */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file for this version */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in this version */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_versions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital asset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the asset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the asset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES digital_assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_fields" (
  "custom_field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom metadata field */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who defined the field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom metadata field */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type of the custom metadata field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the custom metadata field */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the field is required */,
  "searchable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the field is searchable */,
  "sortable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the field is sortable */,
  "editable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the field is editable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("custom_field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_fields_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES client_info ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_info" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the client */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the client's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the client account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the client account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)
